_schema_note: Canonical spec for the ProductLaunch composition (First-Principles Product Check Test #1). Self-describing manifest consumed by `tools/check_product_launch_demo.sh` (canonical assertions) and the future SDK --props passthrough (per the user-spec command line).
_honesty_note: The user-literal `chronon render --props` form is Remotion-style and does not exist in the real `chronon3d_cli` surface. The gate uses the canonical `chronon3d_cli video` form (real CLI), and consumes this JSON defensively (composition duration, fps, dimensions) for property assertions.

hero_image.state: manifest-cleansed (ImageParams.asset_path forwarding ready, path field kept for backward compat with examples/* snapshots)

title_text.animation: fade-in Frame{30..45} + hold + scale overshoot 0.92→1.00 + fade-out Frame{78..90}

camera_2_5d.formula: position_x = radius * cos(2π * frame / period); position_z = -radius * sin(2π * frame / period)

transition.implementation: overlapping layers with mirrored opacity_anim (hero 1.0→0.0 Frame{45..60}; title 0.0→1.0 Frame{30..45})

motion_blur._api_surface: CLI flag only -- no per-layer API in LayerBuilder; enabled via --motion-blur in RenderQualityArgs (see apps/chronon3d_cli/commands.hpp)
